name: labystudio
description: Local workflow editor for LabyPath using a Node backend and React Flow frontend.

scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace @labystudio/shared && npm run dev --workspace @labystudio/web
scripts.dev:server: npm run build --workspace @labystudio/shared && npm run dev --workspace @labystudio/server
scripts.lint: npm run build --workspace @labystudio/shared && npm run lint --workspace @labystudio/shared && npm run lint --workspace @labystudio/server && npm run lint --workspace @labystudio/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @labystudio/shared && npm run build --workspace @labystudio/server && npm run build --workspace @labystudio/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @labystudio/shared && npm run test --workspace @labystudio/shared && npm run test --workspace @labystudio/server && npm run test --workspace @labystudio/web
